input.headline: Another Canadian joins Gretzky, Crosby as lone NHL teens with 30 points in first 20 games of a season

raw.headline: Another Canadian joins Gretzky, Crosby as lone NHL teens with 30 points in first 20 games of a season

winner: Another Canadian teenager just joined Gretzky and Crosby in scoring 30 points in his first 20 NHL games—turns out, the league’s scouting department must’ve been napping during tryouts.

candidates.text: So, this rookie from Canada breaks into the NHL and scores 30 points in his first 20 games—just like Wayne Gretzky and Sidney Crosby. His coach says, "Kid, you're a natural." The player replies, "Actually, I'm a Canadian. Natural is just what we do to your power play.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever with a specific reference to Canadian hockey culture and a play on 'natural' in relation to the power play. It's concise and surprising, though the punchline could be more tightly worded for maximum impact."}

candidates.text: Why did the Canadian teen join Gretzky and Crosby in the 30-point club? Because he was too good at hockey to be lonely—turns out, he had three sticks up his sleeve!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the 'three sticks up his sleeve' pun, but it's a bit forced and doesn't fully align with the headline's specificity. The humor is mild and lacks the punch needed for maximum impact."}

candidates.text: A hockey player scored 30 points in his first 20 games, so his coach told him, "You're like Gretzky and Crosby—just don't get too carried away with the puck.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks specificity and surprise. It's generic and doesn't fully capture the humor potential of comparing a player to Gretzky and Crosby."}

candidates.text: This kid is scoring so fast he's got a better first-period than a hockey goalie's confidence!
